tasks.label: prod: get token
args: cd /var/www/teaching_panel/teaching_panel && ../venv/bin/python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; from rest_framework_simplejwt.tokens import AccessToken; u=get_user_model().objects.get(id=4); print('TOKEN:' + str(AccessToken.for_user(u)))"

tasks.label: prod: auth+join smoke
prod: create test teacher
args: ssh tp "cd /var/www/teaching_panel/teaching_panel && source ../venv/bin/activate && python -c 'from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model, authenticate; from django.utils import timezone; from accounts.models import Subscription; import secrets,string; User=get_user_model(); now=timezone.now(); alphabet=string.ascii_letters+string.digits; pw=\"\".join(secrets.choice(alphabet) for _ in range(16)); suffix=secrets.token_hex(3); day=now.strftime(\"%Y%m%d\"); email=\"test_teacher_{}_{}@test.local\".format(day,suffix); user=User.objects.create_user(email=email,password=pw,role=\"teacher\",first_name=\"Тест\",last_name=\"Учитель\"); sub=Subscription.objects.create(user=user,plan=Subscription.PLAN_MONTHLY,status=Subscription.STATUS_ACTIVE,expires_at=now+timezone.timedelta(days=30),auto_renew=False); ok=authenticate(username=email,password=pw) is not None; print(\"CREATED_TEACHER_EMAIL=\",email); print(\"CREATED_TEACHER_PASSWORD=\",pw); print(\"SUB_STATUS=\",sub.status); print(\"SUB_EXPIRES_AT=\",sub.expires_at.isoformat()); print(\"AUTH_OK=\",int(ok));'"

tasks.label: prod: cleanup files
args: cd /var/www/teaching_panel/teaching_panel && source ../venv/bin/activate && python manage.py cleanup_local_homework_files > /tmp/cleanup.log 2>&1 && cat /tmp/cleanup.log

tasks.label: status-all
tasks.command: ssh tp "echo === STATUS === && systemctl is-active teaching_panel nginx fail2ban && echo && echo === UFW === && sudo ufw status | head -10 && echo && echo === RATE LIMIT === && grep -c limit_req /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && echo zones configured"

tasks.label: services-status
tasks.command: ssh tp systemctl is-active teaching_panel nginx fail2ban

tasks.label: prod: sync monitoring scripts
tasks.command: ssh tp 'sudo cp /var/www/teaching_panel/scripts/monitoring/*.sh /opt/lectio-monitor/ && sudo chmod +x /opt/lectio-monitor/*.sh && echo SYNC_OK'

tasks.label: scp cleanup script
tasks.command: scp scripts/monitoring/cleanup_processes.sh tp:/opt/lectio-monitor/cleanup_processes.sh && ssh tp 'sudo chmod +x /opt/lectio-monitor/cleanup_processes.sh && echo Done'

tasks.label: reset memory alert state
tasks.command: ssh tp 'sudo rm -f /var/run/lectio-monitor/memory_alert_state && echo State reset'

tasks.label: build-no-ci
tasks.command: cmd /c "set CI=false && cd /d c:\Users\User\Desktop\nat\frontend && npm run build"
